title: SCM Workflow State
description: Gate surface for the lakebase-scm-workflows state machine. Lives at .lakebase/workflow-state.json in a paired project. One file per project root (single feature in flight at a time, v1).

$schema.description: Optional schema reference for editor tooling.

version.description: Schema version. Bumped when the shape changes incompatibly.

state.description: Current state in the SCM workflow.

tier_topology.description: Long-running tier count chosen at scaffold. 1=prod, 2=prod+staging, 3=prod+staging+dev.

project_id.description: LAKEBASE_PROJECT_ID, mirrored from .env so the state file is self-contained.

feature_id.description: Feature identifier (e.g. F1-initial-domain). Required from feature-claimed onward.

branch.description: Git/Lakebase branch name for the current feature. Required from feature-claimed onward.

parent_branch.description: Lakebase parent the feature branch forks from (production for tier 1, staging for tier 2, dev for tier 3). Required from feature-claimed onward.

lakebase_branch_uid.description: Lakebase-assigned branch UID (e.g. br-broad-sky-d2k5gewt). Required from feature-claimed onward.

claimed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of feature-claim. Required from feature-claimed onward.

pr_url.description: GitHub PR URL. Required from pr-ready onward.

pushed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of git push. Required from pr-ready onward.

ci_run_url.description: GitHub Actions / CI run URL. Required from ci-green onward.

ci_green_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when CI turned green. Required from ci-green onward.

merged_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of merge. Required from merged state.
